MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-08-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE SEP-08-2022 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF BANK OF STOCKTON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES AGAINST DEFENDANT, CHRISTOPHER NORTON, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF STOCKTON, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTON, CHRISTOPHER $122,092.25 PRINCIPAL, $1,600.50 ATTORNEY FEES, $12,009.33 INTEREST, $1,305.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $137,007.08, SEE SCANNED DOC
